subcodes.first_line: Thou beholdest me, O my God, immersed in the oceans of wonderment and plunged in the depths of bewilderment, and I know not how [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ترانی یا الهی قد استغرقت فی بحار الحیره و خضت فی غمار الذهول و لم دار کیف
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @prayer for forgiveness
